response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content, identifying it as a slideshow of fan messages and concert merchandise information. 2. Listened to the audio, which is confirmed to be purely instrumental background music. 3. Defined scenes based on visual changes (merch, messages, event promo, visitor attention). 4. Confirmed no vocal songs are present, so all 'contains_vocal_music' fields are set to 'false'.
response.global_summary: This video is a promotional showcase for the Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis 1st Concert, 'Drawn to Dawn'. It features a loop of fan-submitted messages and displays information about available concert merchandise and venue rules. The background audio throughout the video is purely instrumental music.

scenes.description: Merchandise information for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert is displayed, including blankets, pouches, and acrylic panels.
A collage of fan messages supporting Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis.
Promotional graphic for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis.
'Attention for Visitors' screen displaying rules for the concert.
Merchandise information including light sticks, T-shirts, towels, and badges.
The video returns to the fan message collage loop, similar to the earlier sections.
